title: DownloadManifest
description: Download manifest file written to the submissions directory by PXL Classroom CLI or SPA.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1 uses archive_sha, archive_branch, archive_branch_url, and downloaded_at.

generated_at.description: The timestamp when the manifest was generated.

archive_sha.description: The git SHA of the student submission preserved in the archive repo.

archive_branch.description: The branch name under which this student's submission is archived.

archive_branch_url.description: The GitHub URL to browse the student's archived branch.

downloaded_at.description: The timestamp when the CLI downloaded the repository, or null if exported from the browser.
